assertions.description: The placement_analysis lists a courtyard overlap between U1 and C1 with overlap_mm2=0.0. A zero-area overlap is a boundary-touching condition, not an actual overlap, and should not be flagged as a courtyard violation. The three real overlaps (U1/R2 at 26.16mm², C5/R1 at 7.41mm², J3/U1 at 3.895mm²) are plausible given the compact 45.72×33.02mm board, but the 0.0mm² entry is a false positive.
